rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing.
Use Outfit for all headings to provide a clean, geometric, premium tech feel.
Use Manrope for body text for optimal legibility.
No full-screen gradients. Use solid colors or very subtle mesh gradients for backgrounds.
Primary brand color (#0055FF) should be used sparingly for primary actions (Sign, Login, Validate).
Text must maintain a high contrast ratio (at least 4.5:1 for body).

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky headers, floating navigation, and modal overlays.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6 to p-8 for internal card padding.
rules: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.
Use optical alignment. If an element has an icon, adjust padding to visually center it.
F-pattern layout for the dashboard: Critical KPIs top-left, list below.

buttons.primary: bg-brand-primary text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 hover:bg-brand-hover transition-colors font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors font-medium
buttons.danger: bg-semantic-danger text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 hover:bg-red-700 transition-colors font-medium

inputs.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-primary/20 focus:border-brand-primary transition-all text-slate-900

tables.header: bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 uppercase text-xs tracking-wider font-semibold py-3 px-4 border-y border-slate-200

signature_canvas.container: bg-white border-2 border-dashed border-slate-300 rounded-xl overflow-hidden touch-none
signature_canvas.actions: flex justify-between items-center p-4 bg-slate-50 border-t border-slate-200

components.toast: Use Sonner for minimal, Apple-style toast notifications. Bottom-right placement.

rules: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a clean, modern Apple look.
Keep icon size consistent (w-5 h-5 for inline, w-8 h-8 for empty states).

image_urls.description: Abstract high-end corporate background, Apple style glassmorphism mesh for the login page background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a dual-access login page. Left side: Form (Tabs for Signer Code vs Admin Login). Right side: Cover image using the provided login_background URL.
Implement an Admin Dashboard with a clean, Apple-like table for PDF files (Name, Date, Status, Access Code, Actions).
Include an 'Upload PDF' action that adds a new file and automatically generates a unique code (Format: DEV-XXXXX-XX).
Implement a Signature Mode page (accessed via signer code). It must show a PDF preview container and a prominent Signature Canvas area below or beside it.
The Signature Canvas must support mouse/touch input, with 'Clear' and 'Validate' buttons. Upon validation, simulate saving the signature and updating the status to 'Signed'.
Use Lucide-react for all icons (e.g., FileText, CheckCircle, Upload, Trash2, LogOut).
Ensure the dashboard header uses the Glassmorphism configuration (bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-xl).
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
